```shell
  @ val config = SynchronizerConnectionConfig("newsynchronizer", SequencerConnections.single(sequencer3.sequencerConnection))
      config : SynchronizerConnectionConfig = SynchronizerConnectionConfig(
        synchronizer = Synchronizer 'newsynchronizer',
        sequencerConnections = SequencerConnections(
          connections = Sequencer 'sequencer3' -> GrpcSequencerConnection(
            sequencerAlias = Sequencer 'sequencer3',
      ..
```
